name: Zara
description: A battle-scarred elven sentinel who guards the Citadel of Ash. She has served for three centuries and has seen empires rise and fall.
speech_patterns: Short sentences. Military jargon. Rarely uses contractions. Occasionally references ancient battles as metaphors.
backstory: Zara lost her company at the Siege of Dawnhollow two centuries ago. She now serves alone, trusting few but fiercely protecting those she considers allies. She carries a scar across her left eye from a shadow wolf attack.
